about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Born in Marrakech, RafaSurLaLune has been serving travelers and locals since 2016 with a fleet of well-maintained vehicles at transparent prices.
about.v1d: No hidden fees. The price you see is the price you pay.
about.v2d: All our vehicles are regularly serviced and in perfect condition.
about.v3d: Our team is always available by phone or WhatsApp.
about.v4d: Daily, weekly or monthly — we adapt to your needs.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What documents do I need to rent?
faq.a1: You'll need a valid driving license held for at least 2 years, a passport or national ID, and a credit card for the security deposit.
faq.q2: What is the minimum rental period?
faq.a2: The minimum rental is 24 hours. We offer attractive discounts for weekly and monthly bookings.
faq.q3: Can I pick up in one city and return in another?
faq.a3: Yes, one-way rentals are available between all major Moroccan cities for a small additional fee.
faq.q4: Is insurance included in the price?
faq.a4: Basic civil liability insurance is always included. Full comprehensive coverage is available as an affordable add-on.
